from sys import stdin
n = int(stdin.readline())
a = sorted([list(map(int, stdin.readline().split())) for _ in range(n)])
if n == 1:
    print(2)
else:
    print(max(a[-1][0], a[-1][1]) - min(a[0][0], a[0][1]) + abs(a[-1][1] - a[0][1]) + abs(a[-1][0] - a[0][0]))

ANSWER(only use python):
from sys import stdin
n = int(stdin.readline())
a = sorted([list(map(int, stdin.readline().split())) for _ in range(n)])
if n == 1:
    print(2)
else:
    print(max(a[-1][0], a[-1][1]) - min(a[0][0], a[0][1]) + abs(a[-1][1] - a[0][1]) + abs(a[-1][0] - a[0][0]))
